sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19173" key="*bakxeioxo/reios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Βακχ-ειοχόρειος</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πούς</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, the foot ̄ ̄ ̆ ̄ ̆, Diom.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2136.tlg001:p.482" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.482</biblScope> </bibl> K.</entryFree>
